signals.raw:

signals.headline: US XRP ETFs Record $12M April Inflows, Global ETPs $20M Amid Retail FUD Peak | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US XRP ETFs Record $12M April Inflows, Global ETPs $20M Amid Retail FUD Peak | YES | HIGH confidence**  
US XRP ETFs saw $12M net inflows in April after $31M March outflows, with global products at $20M; XRP up 2% to $1.35, on track for first green month since Sep 2025 despite 63% prior wipeout and 2-year high retail fear signaling buy opportunities.[2] XRP ranks 3rd in global institutional inflow

signals.raw:
Ripple Launches Digital Asset Accounts and Unified Treasury in Treasury Management System | YES | MED confidence**  
Ripple announced native digital asset capabilities embedded in its treasury system, targeting short-term XRP price to $1.40-$1.60 amid recovery signals (XRP at $1.31, down 0.63% in last 24h).[4]
